description: Model must plan a two-step chain: first fetch the user profile to obtain their org_id, then call the billing status tool using that org_id. Tests whether the model correctly identifies the dependency and emits calls in the right sequence with the threaded parameter.
prompt: I need to check the billing status for the organisation that user 'usr_c2x9qf' belongs to. First look up their profile to get the org ID, then use that org ID to fetch the billing status. Show me the planned sequence of tool calls you would make.

toolDefinitions.name: get_user_profile
toolDefinitions.description: Retrieves a user's profile, including their name, email, role, and org_id.

toolDefinitions.name: get_billing_status
toolDefinitions.description: Returns the current billing status, overdue balance, and next renewal date for an organisation.
